summary: Iteration 7 (Pro Profile Completion + Alternate Gmail OTP + Credit Pill + DateTimePicker + ₹1500/hire). Added /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7.py with 15 NEW iter-7 tests. Full backend suite 117/117 GREEN (102 baseline + 15 new). Backend coverage: GET /auth/me as pro returns profile_completion 0–100 with user.email_verified=true / gmail_verified=false / alternate_gmail=null (and absent for student); POST /pro/gmail/send-otp 400 for non-gmail.com domain, 400 if same as login email, 400 for invalid email, 401/403 for non-pro, 200 with mock_otp under TEST_RETURN_OTP=1 for valid gmail.com; POST /pro/gmail/verify-otp 400 wrong/no-pending, 200 on success setting user.gmail_verified=true + user.alternate_gmail=email + profile.alternate_gmail; profile_completion math verified end-to-end (base ~14 with only email verified → ~86 after phone+designation+experience+skills+photo → 100 after gmail verify); PRO_PROFILE_FIELDS expanded fields (phone, current_location, skills, profile_photo_base64) persist via PUT /profile; alternate_gmail field accepted in ProfileBody but does NOT set gmail_verified (correctly requires OTP flow); GET /api/jobs?mine=true (no trailing slash) returns 200 directly with no 307 redirect AND filters to caller's jobs only. Frontend smoke (mobile viewport via web preview): signup as @acmecorp.io pro → verify mock OTP → /professional/profile shows: avatar+name+rating+credits pill (Available + 0) at top-right tappable → wallet (collapsed History, toggle-history expands), profile completion bar (0% initially), Verification card (Company Email Verified + Gmail Pending badges), Personal Information (Mobile Number, Company Email read-only with lock note, Alternate Gmail input + Send verification OTP), Professional Details (Company / Designation / Years / Location / Skills) + Save button. /professional/slots — DatePickerField opens modal with weekday/date list (Mon Jun 8 / Tue Jun 9 / Wed Jun 10 …); TimePickerField opens 12-hour AM/PM modal; manual text entry disabled (TouchableOpacity triggers only). /professional/dashboard 'Refer Candidate' tile shows '+₹1500/hire' and routes correctly to /professional/my-jobs on tap. /professional/post-job shows '₹1500/hire' (no legacy '500/hire' anywhere). 1 frontend bug found: legacy /professional/refer DOES NOT redirect to /professional/my-jobs on a direct cold page-load — useEffect fires before Root Layout mounts (console: 'Attempted to navigate before mounting the Root Layout component'). Page just stays on /refer showing 'Redirecting…' text. Carried-over RN-Web warnings remain: shadow* deprecated, props.pointerEvents deprecated, Mock OTP still rendered in UI when present.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 200 with mock_otp even for the SECOND consecutive request to the same alternate gmail (no rate-limit / cooldown). Previous OTP rows remain non-consumed in the otps collection. Cosmetic/clean-up concern; verify-otp still picks the latest via sort:[(created_at,-1)] so functionally OK.
Carried over from iter-6: SendGrid 401 in env; mock_otp fallback keeps tests + UI alive but real emails are dropped silently.
Carried over from iter-6: posting_reward_paid only present on docs once paid (Mongo doesn't materialize default false). applications_count IS populated.

ui_bugs.issue: On a direct cold page-load to /professional/refer, the useEffect(router.replace('/professional/my-jobs')) fires before the Root Layout mounts and the navigation is rejected with console error 'Attempted to navigate before mounting the Root Layout component'. The user is stranded on the /refer page showing only the 'Redirecting to My Posted Jobs…' text. Fix: use expo-router's <Redirect href='/professional/my-jobs' /> component instead of useEffect+router.replace (Redirect is layout-mount safe).

Pill shows label 'Available' + balance only; spec said 'Available Credits' pill. Tiny copy mismatch — consider changing the label to 'Available Credits' or 'Credits' so the meaning is unambiguous when balance is 0.
Mock OTP code is still rendered directly on the verify screen whenever response.mock_otp is present. Should be gated on __DEV__ / EXPO_PUBLIC_SHOW_MOCK_OTP.

issues: Carried over: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated (move into style). Non-blocking RN-Web warnings, but they appear on every screen load.

action_items: (HIGH) Fix /app/frontend/app/professional/refer.tsx redirect — replace useEffect(router.replace) with expo-router's <Redirect href='/professional/my-jobs' /> component, OR defer the replace with a setTimeout/requestAnimationFrame so it fires after Root Layout mount. Currently a direct cold-load to /professional/refer leaves the user stranded.
(LOW) profile.tsx credits pill: change 'Available' label to 'Available Credits' to match spec wording.
(MEDIUM, carried over) Gate Mock OTP visible code on __DEV__ / EXPO_PUBLIC_SHOW_MOCK_OTP so it cannot leak in production builds.
(LOW, carried over) Replace shadow* with boxShadow and move pointerEvents into style across components.
(Optional cleanup) /pro/gmail/send-otp could mark previous non-consumed alt-gmail OTPs as consumed when issuing a new one (currently just inserts a fresh row).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 2175 lines — splitting into routers is overdue (auth, profile, jobs, interviews, applications, leaderboard, wallet, admin, payouts, pro_extras).

compute_pro_profile_completion (server.py:673-688) hardcodes user.email_verified factor to default True via .get('email_verified', True). For new pros email_verified is actually set during signup verify-otp and is True, but defaulting to True hides any future regression where a pro slips past email verify. Consider asserting True only when explicitly set.

GmailVerifyBody (server.py:262) requires email but accepts otp Optional[str]=None — send-otp uses the same body shape so verify-otp will succeed against a body with otp=None? No — endpoint 629 explicitly checks `if not email or not code` and returns 400. OK, but consider a separate VerifyGmailBody for stronger typing.

pro_gmail_send_otp does not invalidate previously issued non-consumed OTPs for the same (user_id,email,purpose) tuple. A burst of resend requests leaves a trail of stale OTP rows; verify-otp picks the latest by created_at sort so it works but is messy. Add update_many({...consumed:False}, {$set:{consumed:True}}) before insert.
profile.tsx: load() useCallback dependency array is [] but it sets a lot of state — fine but it now silently ignores load errors with empty catch. Should at least log.
refer.tsx redirect pattern (useEffect+router.replace) is anti-pattern for entry-route redirects in expo-router; <Redirect /> component is the correct primitive.

success_rate.frontend: 91% — 10 of 11 flows verified (profile credits pill+completion+badges+personal info+pro details, wallet credits pill nav + collapsed history toggle, DatePickerField + 12h AM/PM TimePickerField in slots, dashboard Refer Candidate → my-jobs, post-job ₹1500/hire). FAILING: legacy /professional/refer cold-load redirect.

seed_data_creation: Throwaway pro user @acmecorp.io created via signup+verify-otp during UI smoke run. Tests also create disposable @referme.io users (cross-domain — note: backend correctly allows referme.io as company domain).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-7 contract endpoints verified end-to-end: GET /api/auth/me as pro now includes top-level profile_completion (int 0-100) + user.email_verified/gmail_verified/alternate_gmail flags (student response unchanged). POST /api/pro/gmail/send-otp requires personal_domains={gmail.com, googlemail.com}, rejects login-email match, mock_otp returned under TEST_RETURN_OTP=1, OTP hashed in db.otps with purpose='verify_alternate_gmail' (15 min expiry). POST /api/pro/gmail/verify-otp consumes the latest non-consumed otp row, sets user.gmail_verified=true / user.alternate_gmail=email / profile.alternate_gmail=email. compute_pro_profile_completion (server.py:673) is 7-factor and each contributes round(1/7*100)=14% (sums to 14/29/43/57/71/86/100 across 1–7 factors). PRO_PROFILE_FIELDS expanded to include phone, current_location, skills, profile_photo_base64, alternate_gmail. GET /api/jobs?mine=true (no trailing slash, no allow_redirects) returns 200 directly. Frontend bug: /professional/refer cold-load fails to redirect — switch to <Redirect /> from expo-router. After main agent fixes refer.tsx, the only retest needed is hitting /professional/refer with fresh browser state and asserting URL ends up at /professional/my-jobs.
rca_of_issue: Legacy /professional/refer redirect bug RCA: useEffect(()=>router.replace(...)) runs on first paint after the screen component mounts; on a COLD page-load expo-router fires the effect before the Root _layout has finished its own initial render → router.replace is rejected with 'Attempted to navigate before mounting the Root Layout component' (logged to console.error). The component then renders its fallback Txt 'Redirecting to My Posted Jobs…' and the user is stuck. Reproduction: open https://refer-connect-11.preview.emergentagent.com/professional/refer in a fresh tab while logged in as a pro — URL stays at /professional/refer. Mitigation: replace `useEffect(()=>router.replace('/professional/my-jobs'),[router])` with `import { Redirect } from 'expo-router'; return <Redirect href='/professional/my-jobs' />;` — Redirect is mount-order-safe by design. Alternatively wrap router.replace in setTimeout(...,0) inside useEffect. Internal navigation from within the app still works because by then Root Layout is mounted — the bug only manifests on cold loads / direct URL entry / browser refresh.
